svg.text: Endlessly Rising Canon (Canon a 2 per tonos) — Musical Offering, BWV 1079
two-voice canon over the royal theme — rises a major second each cycle, returning an octave higher after six (cycle 1)
c → d → e → f♯ → g♯ → b♭ → c′ (whole-tone ladder)
“Ascendenteque Modulatione ascendat Gloria Regis” — original inscription
